title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SFC Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SFC Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
